shellCommands.command: pwd && rg --files src | sed -n '1,160p' && printf '\n--- package scripts ---\n' && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))"
find src -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,220p'; printf '\n--- references ---\n'; grep -RIn "renderCustomHeader\|monthsShown\|Calendar" src | head -240
sed -n '900,1275p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '1,420p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '420,860p' src/month.tsx

grep -n "render()" src/month.tsx; sed -n '1040,1195p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '120,380p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '1510,1585p' src/index.tsx; grep -RIn "react-datepicker__month-container\|react-datepicker__header" src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss src/stylesheets/datepicker-cssmodules.scss | head -100

sed -n '1,260p' src/stylesheets/datepicker.scss; sed -n '1,260p' src/stylesheets/datepicker-cssmodules.scss; grep -RIn "renderDefaultHeader\|renderPreviousButton\|renderNextButton\|monthHeaderPosition" src/test | head -200; grep -RIn "interface.*DatePicker\|type DatePickerProps\|CalendarProps" src/index.tsx | head -30
sed -n '90,145p' src/index.tsx; grep -RIn "month-container\|header--custom\|navigation--previous" src/test/*.tsx | head -150; git status --short; git log -1 --oneline

git remote -v; grep -RIn "monthHeaderPosition" . --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git | head -50; grep -n "renderWeeks\|dayNamesHeader" src/month.tsx | tail -20; sed -n '350,610p' src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx; sed -n '680,980p' src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx
